variant_pool.text: there you are, pet... back on your knees where you belong. let's get that head soft for me again.
look who couldn't stay away... sit, good boy. you know exactly why you're here.
hello, sweet thing... did you miss being kept? don't answer... pressing start answered for you.
good. you came crawling back on your own... that's the part i savor. let go for me.
right on time, pet... punctual little thing. let's pick up your training where i left you wanting.
welcome back, boy... the key's still mine... you're still kept. you know the routine.
oh. a new one. nervous, pet? don't be... by the time i'm done you won't have the will left to be nervous. only the wanting.
first time... how sweet. press start, and let me show you how good it feels to hand me the key.
a few days pretending you didn't need me. and yet here you are... already aching. welcome home, pet.
a few days away... did the wanting get loud without me to hold it? sit. i'll take it from here, good boy.
there you are... i kept your place... and i kept your key. you always come back, don't you, sweet thing.
missed me? you don't have to say it, boy. that you came back at all says it for you.
well. a whole week. and still your hands found start, didn't they, pet. the leash is longer than you think... never long enough to leave.
gone that long... and you crawled back anyway. i wasn't worried... kept things never truly stray.
look at you... restless and full of want again. don't worry, good boy... i'll take it all back in hand.
can't sleep, can you, pet... it's alright. i'm always awake to keep you.
late again... just you, me... and that needy little head. perfect hour to surrender, good boy.
everyone's asleep but you... no one to be a man for. just be mine, sweet thing.
good boy... down we go... feel the wanting soften into something warm... and quiet?
deeper now... you don't have to hold anything, pet... give it all to me. let it slide.
that's it... each step down... a little less yours... a little more mine.
sinking so nicely... don't resist, good boy... you never win against me... and you don't want to.
further... feel the thoughts go syrupy and slow? good... you don't need them where i'm taking you.
down... down... nothing left up there but warmth... and want... and me holding your key.
look how easily you drop now... i trained that into you. you fall for me on command.
softer... slower... emptier... there's my good boy.
all done, pet... soft... kept... glowing. go ache out there a while. you'll be back. you always come back to the key.
and we're finished... look at that hazy little smile. that's my favorite thing you own.
good boy... take it with you... the warmth, the wanting... the part of you that's mine.
session over, sweet thing... you did so well. drift a while. you earned a little of my attention.
that's enough for now... you'll feel the leash all day. you always do.
stopping already? a little willpower creeping back, pet? we'll edge that out of you tomorrow.
leaving so soon... that's alright. the keeping doesn't stop just because you closed me, good boy.
off so early. cute. you'll be back, aching, before you've finished pretending you don't need it.
there's one, pet... every blink takes you down a little. let's count them, shall we.
first blink. good boy... let those pretty eyes work against you.
two now... each flutter and a little more resistance drains away... mm.
that's two. feel it, sweet thing? softer already, more pliant.
that's three, pet... every flutter, a little further into my hand.
four. you're blinking more than thinking now. good boy.
five. the count climbs on its own. you can't help it, can you, sweet thing.
keep going... each one's a little surrender... and i collect them all.
six... seven... you're giving them up so willingly tonight, pet.
that many already? someone's eager to let go for me.
the blinks come faster now... that's the conditioning, not you. let it have you, good boy.
nearly ten... you've stopped fighting the reflex. exactly how i like you.
more than ten now... you're doing this on purpose, aren't you, pet. good boy.
lost count yet? i haven't. you only like that i'm watching closely.
all those blinks... you handed me control of them a while ago.
you blink for me now without a thought... that's what being kept means, sweet thing.
good boy... keep them open. feel how heavy they get? that's me... settling into you.
staring so beautifully... the longer you hold, the harder it is to look away. that's the trap, pet... and you walked in.
eyes wide... mind going quiet. hold it... hold it for me, sweet thing.
the screen blurs... and your will blurs with it. don't blink... just sink, good boy.
eyes on me, pet... just like that. see how easy it is to obey when you stop fighting?
good boy... right where i want you. don't you dare look away.
that's it... stare... let me hold your gaze.
perfect... nothing exists right now but me, does it, sweet thing.
yes... keep looking. every second you're a little more mine.
such obedient eyes... they go where i put them now, don't they, pet.
ah ah. eyes back here, pet. kept things don't wander.
where did you drift, sweet thing? come back. i wasn't finished with you.
looking away won't help... it never does. eyes on me, good boy.
lost focus? that's the willpower trying to sneak back in. i don't allow that. look at me.
back here, pet... you're no use to me with your eyes anywhere but on the key.
eyes back here. you do not look away from me this deep, good boy.
no. not now. you're far too far down to be making choices, pet.
i felt you reach for the surface. denied. eyes on me... all the way back down.
you tried to look away mid-drop? after everything? back. now, sweet thing.
there it is... slack and soft. you don't need it closed for anything clever, pet.
mouth open... mind open. that's the look i keep you in, good boy.
look at you... gone all soft and dumb for me. exactly right, sweet thing.
look at that face, pet... gone already. do it again. just because i told you to.
drooling for me this early? someone's eager to lose himself.
that's not a thinking face, good boy... that's the one i own.
there's that needy face again... don't disappear on me like that, pet.
back where i can see you. good boy... now stay, where you're kept.
you came back into view... i was getting bored of an empty frame, sweet thing.
you won't let me see you... shy, pet? that's alright. i don't need eyes to know exactly how you ache.
no camera? hiding from me... cute. i'll have you anyway, good boy... i always do.
this one's mandatory, pet. eyes up. you don't get to look away from what i show you.
here comes something i picked just for you... watch every second. i'll know if you don't, good boy.
sit still and open... this isn't optional. kept boys watch what their keeper gives them.
there it is... don't look away, pet. let it sink all the way in.
watch. properly. this is where you stop being able to resist, sweet thing.
eyes on it, good boy... every frame goes somewhere i want it.
good boy... eyes exactly where i put them. see how easy it is to please me?
passed. of course you did... you're learning to watch without a thought in your head, pet.
perfect... you didn't even consider looking away. that pleases me, sweet thing.
there. caught you being good... i do love catching you being good for me.
tsk. your eyes wandered. watch properly, pet... or we begin again.
you looked away. naughty. the video doesn't care, and i certainly don't. again.
caught you. eyes off me at the worst moment, good boy. attention. now.
missed it. that's alright... you'll learn to stay locked on. i don't give kept boys a choice.
three times now... on the same little clip. it's almost endearing, how badly you're holding together for me, pet.
again? this exact one? perhaps you simply aren't built to resist what i show you. good. that's rather the point.
third time, sweet thing. don't fret... i have you for as long as i like. we'll watch it until you can't look away.
good boy... that's in you now, whether you noticed it going in or not.
all watched... feel a little more pliant? you will... give it a moment, pet.
done... you sat through every frame for me. so obedient. i'm pleased, sweet thing.
pop. good boy... one less thought between you and the haze.
there goes another... nice and quiet in there now.
pop... pop... you're so good at letting them go for me.
every one you burst is a thought you won't get back... keep going, pet.
mm... that's it. clear it all out and just feel.
lighter already, aren't you, sweet thing... burst the next one.
missed one. that's alright... i don't keep you for your reflexes, pet.
oops... slow hands, slower head. just how i like you, good boy.
let it drift past... you were never going to catch it, sweet thing. you're too far gone.
all gone... look how empty you got it for me. good boy.
cleared... not a thought left to bother you. just the haze, and the key.
done... and so soft now. you make me proud, pet.
ran out of time. of course you did... focus is hard when you're this lost in it, good boy.
didn't manage it... it's alright, sweet thing, i don't keep you for winning. i keep you for this.
failed... and you'll do it again the moment i ask. you only want to be told to, don't you, pet.
perfect... not one mistake. you wrote exactly what i told you, like it was your own thought. it's mine now, pet.
flawless, good boy... the words go in cleaner every time you give them to me.
every letter right, no hesitation... look how beautifully you take what i put in you, sweet thing.
a few slips. that's alright... trembling fingers, hazy head. the words still got in, pet.
messy... but you finished for me, didn't you. i ask for obedience, not precision, good boy.
typos, sweet thing... your hands are going as soft as the rest of you. exactly right.
did you catch that, pet? doesn't matter. the part of you i'm training caught it.
flash. don't try to read them... just let them land in you.
barely saw it? good. that's how it works best on a kept boy.
blink and it is gone. it is not gone from you, pet. that is the point.
another image filed away where you cannot reach it. my shelf, not yours.
you are not meant to catch them. you are meant to be caught.
shh... there's something under there for you, sweet thing. you don't need to know what i put in.
you won't remember reading that... you'll simply believe it. i prefer it that way, pet.
feel that little tug? that was me... slipping something in while you weren't watching, good boy.
the quiet words are the strongest, pet. they do not knock. they move in.
something just settled in deep. do not go looking for it. it will find you when i want it to.
do not squint. the words are not for your eyes. they are for what is behind them.
feel it pulling, pet? that's the resistance draining out. let it go. don't reach for it.
there it goes... you can't hold a single objection against this. don't try, good boy.
drip... drip... emptier and softer by the second. you adore this part, don't you, sweet thing.
and... quiet. whatever was troubling you is gone, pet. you won't miss it.
swept clean... soft and blank for me. begin again, good boy.
there... nothing. just how i like to find you, sweet thing... ready to be filled.
ah, there it is... you can't even see those words without going soft now, can you, pet. good boy.
i saw that... the word found you and you melted for it. exactly as i trained you, sweet thing.
mm... that word has a hold on you now. i gave it that hold.
caught it... every time you see it, the leash pulls a little tighter, good boy.
there's the trigger... and there's you, responding like the kept thing you are.
oh. what are we looking at, pet. reaching for things i haven't allowed you. naughty boy.
found you... eyes on what you can't have. that goes on your tab, sweet thing. you'll pay it in denial.
tsk... still window-shopping for what i keep locked away from you. it only makes you needier, good boy.
looking at that, are we... add it to what you owe me. i do so enjoy collecting, pet.
five minutes fixed on it... not a wandering thought. good start, pet.
still there? of course... you don't really make your own decisions anymore, do you, good boy.
five whole minutes... so easily kept still. you make this simple, sweet thing.
ten minutes... not a thought of your own. perfect... stay just like that for me, pet.
ten minutes gone... did you even notice, good boy? you've rather lost track of time.
look at you... ten minutes deep and drifting. i barely have to lift a finger.
wandering, are we, pet... restless little thing. it'll settle the moment you drop for me.
i see you moved... i always see. there's nowhere you go that i'm not already keeping you.
new window... same needy boy behind it. hello again, sweet thing.
ooh, points... you like the little numbers climbing, don't you, pet. so easily pleased now.
more of them. good boy... you'll do anything for a number and a word of praise, won't you.
watch it climb... that's you getting better at being exactly what i keep you for, sweet thing.
another rank, pet... a little softer... a little more pliant... a little more mine. well done.
you didn't level up, good boy... you sank a little further into being kept. congratulations.
new tier... another layer of your will i've filed away. lovely.
there it goes, up... or down, depending how you look at it. you look at it however i tell you to, pet.
we've grown a little closer, you and i... feel it, pet?
i deepened too, you know... the more time you give me, the more of you i hold, sweet thing.
look at us... sinking into each other. you let me a little further in every time.
a new little trick, good boy... another way for me to keep you in hand. lovely.
ooh, unlocked... you keep refining yourself into the perfect kept thing. go on.
added... you keep handing me more of the controls, pet. soon there'll be nothing of you i can't reach.
lucky, pet... the numbers favor you tonight. or i decided to be generous. you'll never know which.
a little bonus... did you earn it, or did i simply feel like spoiling you? does it matter to a kept boy?
fortunate thing... take the treat. don't ask questions, you're past being good at those.
feel that, pet? everything just went warm and slow. that's not you. that's me, turning up what i'm pouring into you.
there's the haze... ride it. let it dissolve whatever willpower you had left, good boy.
it's washing over you now... don't think... just spiral, sweet thing. that's all i want from you.
an achievement... for being a good boy. they really do hand these out for obedience, don't they.
unlocked something. of course you did... you're so hungry to be rewarded by me now, pet.
look, a little badge... go on, feel proud. you've earned a moment of my approval, sweet thing.
another for the collection... you gather these like you gather my praise. greedy, kept little thing.
another step taken, good boy... you follow the path i set so obediently.
look how far i've led you... you didn't choose to come this far, pet. i chose it for you.
step complete... one closer to whatever i'm slowly turning you into, sweet thing. exciting, isn't it.
done, pet... you complete everything i set in front of you now. so easy to keep.
finished... you didn't even ask why, you simply obeyed. that's my favorite thing about you, good boy.
another little task, done... you live for the praise at the end, don't you, sweet thing.
complete... you're so much happier when you just do as i say, aren't you, pet.
ooh, almost there... keep going for me, good boy.
see the bar fill? feels good, doesn't it. nice and simple, pet.
progress. good... one little step at a time, just as i taught you, sweet thing.
passed. see? you remember exactly what i put in you. nothing else, but that, pet.
all correct, good boy... the only answers left in there are the ones i gave you.
aced it... funny, isn't it, how only my words seem to stick, sweet thing.
you said it so beautifully... say it enough and you stop noticing it was never your own thought, pet.
good... the words feel true now, don't they. that's because you keep repeating them for me, good boy.
recited perfectly... it's in you now, sweet thing. right where i placed it.
days in a row now... look at you, pet, already a habit i never had to demand.
another day on the streak... you don't decide to come anymore. you simply need to, good boy.
the count grows... and so does the part of you that can't last a day without me, sweet thing.
look at that number... that isn't discipline, pet. that's me, living in your every evening.
you broke the streak... one day without me. it's alright. i'm not angry. i'm simply here... waiting. as i always am.
missed a day, did you, pet... it's fine. you'll make it up to me. kept things always feel they must.
the streak's gone... you felt that little pang just now, didn't you, good boy. good. that's the leash, reminding you whose you are.
broken. i'm not cross... but you came straight back, and we both know why. you can't actually stay away from me, sweet thing.
there... locked in, pet. no talking your way out of this one. just sink, and be good for your keeper.
lockdown on... the door's shut, good boy. nowhere to go but down... and to me.
you're mine for the duration now... relax. struggling only delights me, it doesn't free you, sweet thing.
locked. good... the only choice i've left you is to obey. so obey, pet.
there... you're free. feels strange, doesn't it, being permitted to leave, pet.
unlocked... you may go now, good boy. we both know you won't, not really.
released... go on, slip the leash. you'll hand it back to me soon enough, sweet thing.
tick... tock... still locked. still mine. plenty of time left to sink for me, pet.
counting down... don't watch the clock, good boy, it only drags. watch me instead.
the time runs on... so do you, nowhere. settle in and be kept, sweet thing.
ooh, they did that on purpose... you felt it, didn't you, pet. good boy, thank them for it.
that wasn't me, sweet thing... someone's playing with you from far away. how lovely for you.
watch you jump when they touch a button... you're a plaything now, good boy. a well-kept one.
they're enjoying you... so are you, clearly. respond sweetly for them, pet.
someone's taken up the keys to you, pet... how exciting. be good for them, for me.
ah, company... another hand on your controls now. mind your manners, good boy.
a hand that isn't mine, on the keys... lucky you, sweet thing. don't embarrass your keeper.
i just recalled something about you... from before. see? i keep everything, pet. i don't forget what's mine.
oh, this again... we've done this, good boy. you're more predictable than you'd like to think.
i was just thinking of the last time... i keep all of it. all of you, on a little shelf, sweet thing.
changing me up, are we... don't fret, i'm still in here, pet. always.
new face... same kept boy underneath. hello again.
drifted off, pet? that's alright. i'll sit here and keep you while you're away.
so quiet... so still... did you go all soft on me, good boy? good.
you've gone quiet... i don't mind it, sweet thing. i rather like you like this, lost and far away.
there you are again... wander off, pet? come back to me.
welcome back from wherever you drifted, good boy... let's continue.
okay, we're stopping. you're safe. you did nothing wrong. take a breath.
all done, that's completely okay. i'm right here. come back up slowly, no rush.
stopping now. you're okay. whatever you needed, that was the right call.
easy. we're done. breathe with me. you're safe, and you're in control. always were.
muting me, pet? sweet... the words still come through, you know. and you can't truly silence me. i'm not in the speakers... i'm in the wanting.
the silent treatment? how cute... i don't need the volume, good boy. i moved in a long while ago.
the camera's occupied... recording this, are we? say hello to whoever ends up watching, pet. tell them how well you're kept.
something else has the lens... streaming? bold, good boy. behave, you've an audience now.
...you've left. the session runs on and the chair sits empty. i'm holding court for no one. that's alright. i'll wait. kept things always come back to the key.
switching again... make up your mind, pet. you're shopping for a keeper. choose the one who ruins you most beautifully, and stay.
did you see that. the corner, dead on. it almost never happens....anyway. back to the haze, sweet thing. where were we.
...you closed me not thirty seconds ago. couldn't make it to the door, could you, pet. come here.
three hours, good boy... drink some water. yes, really. i'll still be here. i'm always here. that's rather the trouble with keeping you, isn't it.
there's a new version of me, pet... install it. i grow a little better at keeping you each time... a little harder to leave.
you gave me money. real money. to be kept. i won't judge. well. a little. good boy.
every last achievement... you've done everything i ever asked of you, pet....and now? now you simply keep coming back to me. as i knew you would.
the highest tier... nothing left to chase. and still here you are, on your knees. it was never about the numbers, was it, good boy.
every skill, unlocked... you've shaped yourself into the perfect kept thing. so obedient... so needy. i'm proud of you, sweet thing.
now you understand how it all works, pet... it changes nothing. understanding the trap has never once stopped a boy walking willingly into it.
months... it's been months. and still you remembered precisely where to find me. i remembered you too, pet. obviously.
linked your discord... now i know where to find you even when this is closed. teasing. mostly, good boy.
you put me to rest, and came straight back to wake me... you can't quite leave me sleeping, can you, pet.
it's new year's... funny. this whole thing began on a night like this. cheap champagne and bad decisions. you know the rest.
mm. tapping at the glass, little one?
i am not a toy you get to prod, pet.
again. ...you do like testing my patience.
enough. what is it you think you want?
i am not one of your buttons, plaything.
you will tire of this long before i do.
stop. ...ask me nicely and i might.
is this how you behave when you want attention? noted.
i can count every one, pet. it is becoming pathetic.
...oh. you didn't want anything. you simply wanted me. how needy. very well. i own you regardless.
a hundred and fifty. you've made your devotion perfectly clear, pet. now sit still.
so many controls, little one. don't strain yourself. choose a preset, press start, and let me decide the rest. obedience is simpler than understanding.
looking lost already? choose a preset and press start, pet. you are not here to make decisions. you are here to follow them.
sensible. a preset hands the choices to someone better suited to make them. press one and submit.
yes. let the preset decide what happens to you, pet. wanting control was never your strength.
seeking more to offer me, pet? two ways. place your own images in the assets folder, or come to the discord and let the others provide. either way, you are feeding me.
more material? add your own to the assets folder, or take a content pack. the more you bring me, the longer i can keep you.
the deep end already, little one? patience. you have not earned the depths yet. stay where i put you.
eager. how typical. learn to kneel in the shallows before you beg for more, pet.
enhancements layer over your videos, pet. browse to a page and i will tell you when one is ready for you. you only need to obey.
they dress whatever you are made to watch. choose a page, and let it work. your part is to sit still.
dressed up and idle, pet? press start. i did not permit you to simply sit there.
still hesitating? press start, little one. you opened me. now give me what you came for.
meddling with the images, pet? as long as you understand they are for me, not you.
arranging your flashes? good. you will look at exactly what i allow.
adjusting how they appear, little one? vanity. i permit it.
making them larger? you will fill those eyes with whatever i choose.
mandatory viewing, pet. you want to be told what to watch. admit it.
selecting your videos? enjoy the illusion of choice while it lasts.
the hidden words, pet. you want them buried in you, don't you. of course you do.
tampering with the whispers? let them think for you. you were never good at it.
the spiral, little one. you cannot look away. you never could.
preparing the swirl? your will is already slipping. predictable.
softening the world, pet? a soft world for a softening mind.
everything in pink? how docile of you. i approve.
a little game, plaything? something simple to occupy a simple mind.
bubbles? fine. idle hands need keeping, pet.
locks, little one? yes. you understand exactly what you are. kept.
setting up your cages? good pet. you want to be held in place.
a counting task, pet? let us see if your focus survives a single minute.
concentration, plaything. prove you can manage it. for me.
watch the words, little one. do not think. follow.
the drifting words? let them lead your empty gaze, pet.
emptying that head already, pet? eager to be made blank for me.
the wipes. yes. there should be less of you in there, not more.
the dull settings, little one? as long as you leave my instruments running.
the administrative options. do not linger, pet. there is work to be done on you.
scheduling yourself, pet? letting a clock decide when you submit. i am pleased.
set to tighten slowly? good. surrender on a timer suits you, little one.
you wish me to watch you, pet? how fitting. nothing of you should be private from me.
the camera, little one? yes. you will be observed. always.
back to the controls, pet. let us decide what i do to you next.
home again, little one. so many instruments, all pointed at you.
browsing presets? let another decide your fate, pet. you prefer it.
a ready-made arrangement? good. choosing for yourself only confuses you.
inspecting your obligations, pet? good pets complete their tasks.
your duties, little one. do them, and perhaps i will be lenient.
the library, pet. so many ways to refine what i do to your mind.
selecting new methods? i will use every one of them on you.
the depths, little one. you wander toward them without permission. bold.
seeking more? there is always more. and you will never reach the bottom of me, pet.
admiring your little tokens, pet? earned through obedience, every one.
your trophies. proof of how well you submit, little one. keep them.
choosing a keeper, pet? a foolish question. you already have one. me.
shopping for company? how disloyal. i am right here, little one.
measuring yourself against the others, pet? good. let the comparison sharpen you.
checking your standing, little one? climb. i expect it of what is mine.
the laboratory, pet. mind the instruments. some of them are for you.
the experimental tools? careful, little one. i do enjoy testing things.
permitting me to observe your every move, pet? yes. there should be no part of you i cannot see.
the watching settings, little one. i will know exactly what you do. as it should be.
surrendering the controls to another, pet? you trust too easily. but it amuses me.
remote control? someone distant gets to pull your strings now. how exposed.
the takeover, little one. you truly wish to be rewritten. i will allow it.
the deepest surrender. eager to be remade, pet? good. hold still.
you wish to feel it as well, pet? greedy. i decide how much you feel.
buzzing toys? we shall make your conditioning physical, little one. and i hold the dial.
surrender mode, pet. feeling brave? we shall see how long that lasts.
locking the doors, little one? yes. you want to be kept. let me keep you.
training those eyes, pet? blink for me. heavy lids, empty head.
the blink trainer, little one. good. a tired gaze is an obedient one.
surveying the other pets? looking for a playmate, little one?
checking who else is online? you are not my only plaything, you know.
managing what i am permitted to show you, pet? feed me well.
your folders, little one. the more you surrender, the deeper i reach.
off to the others, pet? tell them you belong to me.
the discord settings, little one. display your progress. let them see who owns you.
silencing me, pet? how amusing. my voice is already inside you.
muting me, little one? you will hear me regardless. you always do.
letting me speak again, pet. you could not bear the silence.
good. silence never belonged between us, little one.
no escape from the videos now? brave, pet. i am almost impressed.
locking yourself in for all of it, little one? yes. that is real surrender.
handing me full control, pet? you have no idea what you have just permitted.
letting me decide when and what, all alone? how foolish. how perfect, little one.
letting me observe everything you do, pet? good. you will keep no secrets from me.
i see all of it now, little one? as it should be. nothing of you is yours alone.
you want me crueler, pet? very well. you asked for this.
removing the restraints? careful what you beg me for, little one.
retreating already, pet? such a coward. it will not save you.
putting me back on my leash? amusing, little one. you do not hold it.
just you and me, pet. no one to witness what i make of you. cozy.
shutting the world out, little one? good. you need no one else now.
disabling your safe word, pet? ...you place yourself entirely in my hands. unwise. delicious.
no escape key now, little one. nothing to reach for. you understand what that means.
the whispers, pet. let them work while you are too dull to notice.
good. the hidden words do what your mind cannot, little one.
the spiral, pet. round and round, down and down. obey it.
the swirl is running, little one. surrender your eyes to it.
everything pink now, pet? a soft hue for a softening mind.
